[]: A request:Seeking epic Gendo Ikari wallpapers.             Quote Post by superjimmyboy » Sun Jan 04, 2009 4:32 pm So,i've been searching all over the place,and i found nothing.Any help would be good!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jan 04, 2009 8:21 pm This is all I have: http://www.tesuji.org/images/wallpapers/nge_bg/male/thumbs/

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Jan 05, 2009 12:08 pm LOL at the iPod one.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Mon Jan 05, 2009 2:51 pm Dunno if this one was in the Eva Wallpaper Archive, but it was the only Gendo wallpaper that came up on konachan. I guess they're hard to find because they're not popular. Though I do remember one wallpaper of an almost-naked Gendo striking a pose and showing off his bulging muscles on a pink background.... [img]http://img156.imageshack.us/my.php?image=konachancom20201455820inr9.jpg[/img] Here's a higher res version if anyone wants it. [url]http://konachan.com/image/a6c57c7ba272d00bfc1ae69355aaea5f/Konachan.com%20-%2014558%20ikari_gendo%20neon_genesis_evangelion.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 05, 2009 6:21 pm It is: http://tesuji.org/images/wallpapers/nge_bg/male/1187757721993.jpg
